summary: Theme park expansion app with upcoming attractions timeline (2027-2029) including Starr Eyes restaurant, Lone Starr stunt show, Chaos Breaths land with shows and meet-and-greets, and Under the Sea live show with pyro effects
architectural_notes: AI-generated images with cartoon/horror/graffiti mixed style
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Upscale horror-themed restaurant exterior with neon stars and eerie dining ambiance in cartoon style mixed with horror and graffiti (starr-eyes-restaurant.dim_800x600.png)
- Action-packed stunt show with performers doing dangerous tricks in a western horror setting, cartoon style with horror and graffiti elements (lone-starr-stunt-show.dim_800x600.png)
- Large themed land entrance with chaotic breath effects and dark atmosphere, cartoon style mixed with horror and graffiti (chaos-breaths-land.dim_1000x600.png)
- Water and fire special effects show with dramatic flames over water surface, cartoon style with horror and graffiti aesthetic (fire-over-water-show.dim_800x600.png)
- Dragon-themed show stage with menacing dragon presence in lair setting, cartoon style mixed with horror and graffiti (dragon-lair-show.dim_800x600.png)
- Underwater ocean scene with sea creatures and pyrotechnic effects bursting from water, cartoon style with horror and graffiti elements and subtle Six Flags America reference (under-the-sea-show.dim_800x600.png)

existing_features.title: Create a new UpcomingAttractionsSection component that displays future park expansions in timeline format showing 2027, 2028, and 2029 attractions grouped by year
Add Starr Eyes restaurant to 2027 attractions with description as an upscale horror-themed dining experience
Add Lone Starr stunt show to 2028 attractions with description of action-packed live stunt performances
Add Chaos Breaths themed land to 2029 attractions as a major new land featuring multiple shows and character meet-and-greets
Add Fire over Water show as a featured attraction within Chaos Breaths land with description of water and fire special effects spectacle
Add Dragon Lair show as a featured attraction within Chaos Breaths land with description of dragon-themed performance
Add character meet-and-greet information to Chaos Breaths land indicating all costume characters will be available for photo opportunities
Add Under the Sea live show with description of pyrotechnic water show and include a Six Flags America easter egg reference in the description
Render all generated AI images for upcoming attractions as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated directory

new_feature_requests.summary: Add upcoming attractions section with timeline view
Add 2029 Chaos Breaths land with Fire over Water show
Add Dragon Lair show to Chaos Breaths land
Add character meet-and-greets to Chaos Breaths land
Add Under the Sea live show with pyro effects and Six Flags America easter egg
